id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

operation.description: Operation name recorded for auditability across implementations.

actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier associated with this operation or projection.

target_id.description: Identifier of the record targeted by this operation or audit event.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp encoded as a portable string.

metadata.description: Adapter-neutral audit metadata; protected values must be redacted or referenced externally.

previous_hash.description: Previous AuditEvent hash for chain integrity when available.

content_hash.description: Canonical content hash used for integrity checks across implementations.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.

namespace.description: Logical namespace used to separate records without requiring a specific storage backend.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

owner_actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier for ownership or accountability metadata.
